2603.09448.title: A Guideline-Aware AI Agent for Zero-Shot Target Volume Auto-Delineation
2603.09448.paper_summary: Delineating the clinical target volume (CTV) in radiotherapy involves complex margins constrained by tumor location and anatomical barriers. While deep learning models automate this process, their rigid reliance on expert-annotated data requires costly retraining whenever clinical guidelines update. To overcome this limitation, we introduce OncoAgent, a novel guideline-aware AI agent framework that seamlessly converts textual clinical guidelines into three-dimensional target contours in a training-free manner. Evaluated on esophageal cancer cases, the agent achieves a zero-shot Dice similarity coefficient of 0.842 for the CTV and 0.880 for the planning target volume, demonstrating performance highly comparable to a fully supervised nnU-Net baseline. Notably, in a blinded clinical evaluation, physicians strongly preferred OncoAgent over the supervised baseline, rating it higher in guideline compliance, modification effort, and clinical acceptability. Furthermore, the framework generalizes zero-shot to alternative esophageal guidelines and other anatomical sites (e.g., prostate) without any retraining. Beyond mere volumetric overlap, our agent-based paradigm offers near-instantaneous adaptability to alternative guidelines, providing a scalable and transparent pathway toward interpretability in radiotherapy treatment planning.
2603.09448.paper_summary_zh: 劃定放射治療中的臨床靶區（CTV）涉及由腫瘤位置和解剖障礙所限制的複雜邊界。雖然深度學習模型自動化了這一過程，但它們對專家標註數據的僵化依賴要求在臨床指導方針更新時進行昂貴的再訓練。為了克服這一限制，我們介紹了OncoAgent，一種新穎的指導方針感知AI代理框架，能夠無需訓練地將文本臨床指導方針無縫轉換為三維靶區輪廓。在食道癌病例的評估中，該代理在CTV上達到了0.842的零樣本Dice相似係數，在規劃靶區上達到了0.880，顯示出與完全監督的nnU-Net基準高度可比的性能。值得注意的是，在一次盲測的臨床評估中，醫生們強烈偏好OncoAgent而非監督基準，並在指導方針遵循、修改工作量和臨床可接受性方面給予了更高的評價。此外，該框架能夠零樣本地推廣到其他食道指導方針和其他解剖部位（例如，前列腺），而無需任何再訓練。超越單純的體積重疊，我們的基於代理的範式提供了對替代指導方針的近乎瞬時的適應性，為放射治療計劃的可解釋性提供了一條可擴展且透明的途徑。
2603.09448.author: Yoon Jo Kim et.al.
2603.09448.authors: Yoon Jo Kim, Wonyoung Cho, Jongmin Lee, Han Joo Chae, Hyunki Park, Sang Hoon Seo, Noh Jae Myung, Kyungmi Yang, Dongryul Oh, Jin Sung Kim
